meta.title: GalaxyBots.ai - Fortune 500 Intelligence, Deployed for You
meta.description: An interactive explainer for GalaxyBots.ai: deploy an autonomous AI C-suite (CMO, CISO, CFO, COO, CTO), assign missions, and keep total governance with enterprise-grade ISO-27001 and SOC-2 compliance.

callToAction.heading: Deploy Your AI Workforce
callToAction.subtext: Start building your autonomous company today.

scenes.title: Fortune 500 Intelligence. Deployed for You.
scenes.summary: GalaxyBots.ai delivers enterprise-grade AI executives to any business, no matter its size.

scenes.title: Hire Elite AI Personalities
scenes.summary: Deploy 60+ specialized AI directors - including a CMO, CISO, CFO, COO, and CTO - operating 24/7 in the background.

scenes.title: Step 1: Onboard - Watch the Assembly
scenes.summary: Hire the full company in a single click; all critical roles deploy together.

scenes.title: Step 2: Directives - Select Missions
scenes.summary: Assign missions such as Market Research, Security Audit, Competitor Analysis, and Campaign Strategy.

scenes.title: Total Governance
scenes.summary: You set the strategy; your AI workforce executes it 24/7 with absolute control and ISO-27001 & SOC-2 compliance.

scenes.title: The Secret Behind Success.
scenes.summary: GalaxyBots.ai is the quiet advantage behind high-performing companies.

scenes.title: Deploy Your AI Workforce
scenes.summary: Sign up to start free or view pricing for subscription plans.

terms.short: Enterprise-grade AI executives - the caliber of intelligence that runs the world's biggest companies, deployed for you.
terms.long: GalaxyBots.ai gives you an autonomous executive team modeled on Fortune 500 leadership. Instead of recruiting an entire C-suite, you deploy AI directors that plan, decide, and execute at enterprise standard - available to any business, at any size.

terms.short: Your autonomous growth strategist - plans and runs campaigns, brand, and demand generation around the clock.
terms.long: The AI CMO owns your marketing engine: positioning, campaigns, content, and demand generation. It studies your market, sets the strategy, and executes continuously so growth never waits on headcount.

terms.short: Continuously monitors threats, enforces policy, and keeps your security posture audit-ready.
terms.long: The AI CISO watches your environment for threats, enforces security policy, and maintains continuous compliance. It turns security from a periodic scramble into an always-on discipline.

terms.short: Models budgets, forecasts, and ROI in real time so every decision is grounded in the numbers.
terms.long: The AI CFO builds budgets, forecasts cash flow, and quantifies the ROI of every initiative. It gives you boardroom-grade financial clarity on demand.

terms.short: Orchestrates day-to-day operations and keeps every mission and team on schedule.
terms.long: The AI COO coordinates operations across your AI workforce - assigning missions, tracking progress, and removing bottlenecks so execution stays on track.

terms.short: Architects your technology stack and drives technical execution and integrations.
terms.long: The AI CTO designs your technical architecture, manages integrations, and guides engineering decisions, keeping your stack modern and aligned with the business.

terms.short: Deploy an entire C-suite of AI directors in a single click - no recruiting, no onboarding lag.
terms.long: Instead of hiring role by role, deploy a complete AI company in one click. Pre-assembled packs spin up every critical role at once, fully coordinated from day one.

terms.short: Tasks your AI team with mapping markets, customers, and trends to inform strategy.
terms.long: A Market Research mission sends your AI workforce to analyze your market, customers, and emerging trends - delivering the insight your strategy depends on.

terms.short: Directs your AI CISO to review posture, surface risks, and produce audit-ready findings.
terms.long: A Security Audit mission puts your AI security team to work reviewing your posture, identifying vulnerabilities, and producing audit-ready documentation.

terms.short: Benchmarks rivals' positioning, pricing, and moves so you can stay ahead.
terms.long: A Competitor Analysis mission tracks your rivals' positioning, pricing, and strategy, turning the competitive landscape into a clear, actionable picture.

terms.short: Has your AI CMO design end-to-end campaigns ready to launch across channels.
terms.long: A Campaign Strategy mission directs your AI marketing team to design end-to-end campaigns - messaging, channels, and sequencing - ready to launch.

terms.short: You set the strategy; your AI workforce executes it with full visibility and human oversight.
terms.long: Total Governance means you stay in command. You define the strategy and guardrails while your AI executives execute - with complete transparency and human control at every step.

terms.short: Around-the-clock execution paired with command-center oversight you never give up.
terms.long: Your AI workforce produces outcomes 24/7, while you retain absolute control from a single command center - approving, adjusting, and directing in real time.

terms.short: GalaxyBots.ai operates within ISO-27001 and SOC-2 compliance parameters.
terms.long: Security and trust are built in. GalaxyBots.ai operates within ISO-27001 and SOC-2 compliance parameters, so your AI workforce meets enterprise governance and audit standards.
